calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Sau-Lai Yeung aka Sau-Lai Clara Yeung, present in pro perd and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Clara Saulai Yeung.
Decree signed in open court.
